\n441\t**Impact**: Eliminates ~138 errors (28% of total) + prevents 403+ restarts  \n442\t**Implementation Time**: 2-4 hours\n443\t\n444\t**Solution**:\n445\t```python\n446\t# Add validation before volatility calculation\n447\tdef safe_implied_volatility(option_price, F, K, t, flag):\n448\t    # Validate parameters\n449\t    if not all([option_price > 0, F > 0, K > 0, t > 0]):\n450\t        logger.warning(\n451\t            f\"Invalid IV calculation parameters: \"\n452\t            f\"price={option_price}, F={F}, K={K}, t={t}\"\n453\t        )\n454\t        return None  # Or use default IV value\n455\t    \n456\t    try:\n457\t        return vectorized_implied_volatility(\n458\t            undiscounted_option_price, F, K, t, flag\n459\t        )\n460\t    except ZeroDivisionError as e:\n461\t        logger.error(f\"IV calculation failed: {e}\")\n462\t        return None\n463\t\n464\t# Update processing loop\n465\tfor option_data in options_stream:\n466\t    iv = safe_implied_volatility(...)\n467\t    if iv is None:\n468\t        continue  # Skip invalid records\n469\t```\n470\t\n471\t**Testing Strategy**:\n472\t1. Test with historical data that triggered errors\n473\t2. Verify logging captures invalid parameters\n474\t3. Confirm no pods restart with invalid data\n475\t4. Monitor error counts for 24 hours post-deployment\n476\t\n477\t---\n478\t\n479\t#### 🟡 HIGH: Improve Cloudflare API Error Handling\n480\t\n481\t**Priority**: HIGH  \n482\t**Impact**: Eliminates 363 errors (72% of total)  \n483\t**Implementation Time**: 4-6 hours\n484\t\n485\t**Solution**:\n486\t```python\n487\tdef verify_deployment_with_backoff(deployment_id, max_retries=3):\n488\t    \"\"\"\n489\t    Verify Cloudflare deployment with exponential backoff and early exit.\n490\t    \"\"\"\n491\t    for attempt in range(max_retries):\n492\t        try:\n493\t            # Check deployment exists first\n494\t            deployment = get_deployment(deployment_id)\n495\t            if not deployment:\n496\t                logger.warning(\n497\t                    f\"Deployment {deployment_id} not found, \"\n498\t                    f\"skipping verification\"\n499\t                )\n500\t                return False\n501\t            \n502\t            # Verify deployment status\n503\t            if deployment['status'] == 'success':\n504\t                return True\n505\t            elif deployment['status'] in ('failed', 'error'):\n506\t                logger.error(f\"Deployment {deployment_id} failed\")\n507\t                return False\n508\t            else:\n509\t                # Still in progress, wait with backoff\n510\t                time.sleep(2 ** attempt)  # Exponential backoff\n511\t                \n512\t        except HTTPError as e:\n513\t            if e.response.status_code == 404:\n514\t                logger.warning(f\"Deployment {deployment_id} not found\")\n515\t                return False  # Exit early on 404\n516\t            elif attempt < max_retries - 1:\n517\t                time.sleep(2 ** attempt)\n518\t            else:\n519\t                raise\n520\t    \n521\t    return False\n522\t\n523\t# Update deployment verification workflow\n524\tdeployment_success = verify_deployment_with_backoff(\n525\t    deployment_id, \n526\t    max_retries=3\n527\t)\n528\t```\n529\t\n530\t**Benefits**:\n531\t- Eliminates retry loops on deleted deployments\n532\t- Reduces API calls from 12 to 3 per failed deployment\n533\t- Improves deployment pipeline reliability\n534\t- Better error logging for debugging\n535\t\n536\t---\n537\t\n538\t#### 🟢 MEDIUM: Clean Up Failed IBKR MCP Pods\n539\t\n540\t**Priority**: MEDIUM  \n541\t**Impact**: Operational hygiene + resource cleanup  \n542\t**Implementation Time**: 15 minutes\n543\t\n544\t**Solution**:\n545\t```bash\n546\t# Remove historical failed pods\n547\tkubectl delete pod ibkr-mcp-server-7d78d47dbb-898mv -n ibkr-mcp\n548\tkubectl delete pod ibkr-mcp-server-7dd7c9c9bc-6cn57 -n ibkr-mcp\n549\t\n550\t# Verify cleanup\n551\tkubectl get pods -n ibkr-mcp\n552\t```\n553\t\n554\t**Benefits**:\n555\t- Cleans up cluster state\n556\t- Reduces monitoring noise\n557\t- Improves operational clarity\n558\t- Frees cluster resources\n559\t\n560\t---\n561\t\n562\t### Medium-Term Improvements\n563\t\n564\t#### 4. Implement Input Validation Framework\n565\t\n566\t**Priority**: MEDIUM  \n567\t**Impact**: Prevents future calculation errors  \n568\t**Implementation Time**: 1-2 days\n569\t\n570\t**Solution Architecture**:\n571\t```python\n572\tfrom pydantic import BaseModel, validator, Field\n573\t\n574\tclass OptionData(BaseModel):\n575\t    \"\"\"Schema for options data with validation.\"\"\"\n576\t    underlying_price: float = Field(gt=0)\n577\t    strike_price: float = Field(gt=0)\n578\t    time_to_expiration: float = Field(gt=0)\n579\t    option_price: float = Field(gt=0)\n580\t    \n581\t    @validator('time_to_expiration')\n582\t    def validate_tte(cls, v):\n583\t        if v <= 0:\n584\t            raise ValueError('Time to expiration must be positive')\n585\t        if v > 365*5:  # 5 years max\n586\t            raise ValueError('Time to expiration too large')\n587\t        return v\n588\t    \n589\t    @validator('option_price')\n590\t    def validate_price(cls, v):\n591\t        if v <= 0:\n592\t            raise ValueError('Option price must be positive')\n593\t        return v\n594\t\n595\t# Use in processing pipeline\n596\tfor raw_data in options_stream:\n597\t    try:\n598\t        validated_data = OptionData(**raw_data)\n599\t        iv = calculate_implied_volatility(validated_data)\n600\t    except ValidationError as e:\n601\t        logger.warning(f\"Invalid options data: {e}\")\n602\t        continue\n603\t```\n604\t\n605\t**Benefits**:\n606\t- Catches invalid data before calculations\n607\t- Provides clear validation error messages\n608\t- Standardizes data quality checks\n609\t- Enables data quality metrics\n610\t\n611\t---\n612\t\n613\t#### 5. Enhance Observability and Monitoring\n614\t\n615\t**Priority**: MEDIUM  \n616\t**Impact**: Better error tracking and alerting  \n617\t**Implementation Time**: 2-3 days\n618\t\n619\t**Solution Components**:\n620\t\n621\t**A. Dashboards and Alerts**:\n653\t```yaml\n654\t# Prometheus alert rules\n655\tgroups:\n656\t- name: options_pipeline\n657\t  rules:\n658\t  - alert: HighVolatilityCalculationErrors\n659\t    expr: rate(volatility_calculation_errors_total[5m]) > 0.1\n660\t    annotations:\n661\t      summary: \"High volatility calculation error rate\"\n662\t      \n663\t  - alert: HighPodRestartRate  \n664\t    expr: rate(kube_pod_status_phase{phase=\"Failed\"}[5m]) > 0.05\n665\t    annotations:\n666\t      summary: \"High pod restart rate detected\"\n667\t```\n668\t\n669\t**Benefits**:\n670\t- Real-time error tracking\n671\t- Proactive alerting before failures\n672\t- Better debugging capabilities\n673\t- Trend analysis and capacity planning\n674\t\n675\t---\n676\t\n677\t#### 6. Implement Circuit Breaker Pattern\n678\t\n679\t**Priority**: MEDIUM  \n680\t**Impact**: Prevents cascade failures from external dependencies  \n681\t**Implementation Time**: 1-2 days\n682\t\n683\t**Solution**:\n684\t```python\n685\tfrom circuitbreaker import circuit\n686\t\n687\t@circuit(failure_threshold=5, recovery_timeout=60)\n688\tdef verify_cloudflare_deployment(deployment_id):\n689\t    \"\"\"Cloudflare deployment verification with circuit breaker.\"\"\"\n690\t    response = cloudflare_api.get(f\"deployments/{deployment_id}\")\n691\t    if response.status_code == 404:\n692\t        raise DeploymentNotFoundError(f\"Deployment {deployment_id} not found\")\n693\t    return response.json()\n694\t\n695\t# Usage with fallback\n696\ttry:\n697\t    result = verify_cloudflare_deployment(deployment_id)\n698\texcept CircuitBreakerOpen:\n699\t    logger.error(\"Circuit breaker open - Cloudflare API unavailable\")\n700\t    # Fallback logic or skip deployment verification\n701\texcept DeploymentNotFoundError:\n702\t    logger.warning(\"Deployment not found\")\n703\t    # Handle expected error\n704\t```\n705\t\n706\t**Benefits**:\n707\t- Prevents cascade failures from external API issues\n708\t- Automatic recovery when service returns\n709\t- Protects against rate limiting\n710\t- Improves system resilience\n711\t\n712\t---\n713\t\n714\t### Long-Term Architecture Improvements\n715\t\n716\t#### 7. Dead Letter Queue Pattern\n717\t\n718\t**Priority**: LOW  \n719\t**Impact**: Better error handling and data recovery  \n720\t**Implementation Time**: 3-5 days\n721\t\n722\t**Architecture**:\n723\t```\n724\tOptions Stream → Validation → Processing → Success\n725\t                    ↓ (failures)\n726\t                 Dead Letter Queue → Manual Review → Reprocess\n727\t```\n728\t\n729\t**Implementation**:\n730\t```python\n731\timport asyncio\n732\tfrom aiokafka import AIOKafkaProducer\n733\t\n734\tclass OptionsProcessor:\n735\t    def __init__(self):\n736\t        self.dlq_producer = AIOKafkaProducer(\n737\t            bootstrap_servers='kafka:9092'\n738\t        )\n739\t        self.main_topic = 'options-processing'\n740\t        self.dlq_topic = 'options-processing-dlq'\n741\t    \n742\t    async def process_option(self, option_data):\n743\t        try:\n744\t            validated = OptionData(**option_data)\n745\t            iv = calculate_implied_volatility(validated)\n746\t            await self.send_to_main(iv)\n747\t        except Exception as e:\n748\t            logger.error(f\"Processing failed: {e}\")\n749\t            await self.send_to_dlq({\n750\t                'data': option_data,\n751\t                'error': str(e),\n752\t                'timestamp': datetime.now().isoformat()\n753\t            })\n754\t```\n755\t\n756\t**Benefits**:\n757\t- Failed records preserved for analysis\n758\t- Manual review and correction workflow\n759\t- Reprocessing capability after fixes\n760\t- Better data quality tracking\n761\t\n762\t---\n763\t\n764\t#### 8. The calculation receives zero or invalid values for critical parameters (likely time to expiration `t`, forward price `F`, or strike price `K`).\n\n**Temporal Pattern**: \n- Consistent throughout operating hours\n- Samples show errors occurring at 10-15 minute intervals\n- Active as of 2026-07-24 08:52:47 and 11:22:18 (most recent samples)\n\n**Impact Assessment**:\n- **Pod Stability**: Causes immediate pod termination and restart (247+ combined restarts)\n- **Data Quality**: Invalid volatility calculations affect options pricing accuracy\n- **Operational**: Creates restart loops affecting service reliability\n- **Business Risk**: High - directly impacts options data processing quality\n\n**Frequency Analysis**:\n- 66 errors in pod-jlzqd over 30 days = ~2.2 errors/day\n- 72 errors in pod-24p6f over 30 days = ~2.4 errors/day  \n- Combined: ~4.6 ZeroDivisionErrors per day\n- Restart correlation: Each error likely causes pod restart\n\n---\n\n#### 2. **Cloudflare API 404 Errors** (363 errors) 🟡 HIGH\n\n**Location**: `options-aggregator-f5ffb54fc-gkj59`\n\n**Error Pattern**:\n```\n2026-07-23 23:38:24 | ERROR | API request failed: GET https://api.cloudflare.com/.../deployments/86efb2b1 - 404 Client Error: Not Found\n```\n\n**Fresh Data Count**: 363 errors in recent sample\n\n**Root Cause**: Deployment verification logic attempts to verify Cloudflare Pages deployments that no longer exist or have invalid deployment IDs. The verification loop retries every 10 seconds until timeout (120s), generating repeated 404 errors.\n\n**Temporal Pattern**:\n- Clustered on single day (2026-07-23)\n- Batch pattern suggests deployment cleanup event\n- Not currently active (most recent samples show no new errors)\n\n**Impact Assessment**:\n- **API Efficiency**: Wastes API quota on repeated failed requests\n- **Deployment Pipeline**: Verification failures block deployment workflows\n- **Resource Usage**: Network and CPU resources wasted on retry loops\n- **Operational**: Deployment monitoring becomes unreliable\n\n**Retry Pattern Analysis**:\n- 363 errors over single day = ~15 errors/hour during active period\n- 10-second retry interval with 120-second timeout = ~12 retries per failed deployment\n- Suggests ~30 failed deployment verification attempts\n\n---\n\n#### 3. **Pod Lifecycle Issues** (247+ restarts) 🟡 MEDIUM\n\n**Location**: Multiple pods across the options No maximum retry limit or deployment existence check\n5. Continues until 120-second timeout (12 retries per deployment)\n\n**Impact Analysis**:\n- **API Efficiency**: 363 errors = ~30 failed deployments × 12 retries\n- **Cost**: Wasted API calls + processing time\n- **Monitoring**: Error logs flooded with expected failure messages\n\n---\n\n### Pattern 3: Exception Handling Leading to Restart Loops\n\n**System**: Options Pipeline  \n**Error Type**: Pod lifecycle issues  \n**Component**: Kubernetes deployment configuration\n\n**Current Behavior**:\n```yaml\n# Inferred deployment configuration\nspec:\n  restartPolicy: Always  # Default for deployments\n  containers:\n  - name: options-greeks\n    # No error handling → exceptions propagate to main process\n```\n\n**Failure Mode**:\n1. Application error occurs (ZeroDivisionError)\n2. Exception propagates to main process (unhandled)\n3. Process exits with error code\n4. Kubernetes detects container failure\n5. Pod restarts per `restartPolicy: Always`\n6. Next invalid record triggers same error\n\n**Impact Analysis**:\n- **Service Stability**: 403 restarts over 26 days = ~15.5 per day\n- **Resource Usage**: Each restart consumes CPU/memory for Actions (High Priority)\n\n#### 🔴 CRITICAL: Fix ZeroDivisionError in Options-Greeks\n\n**Priority**: CRITICAL  \n**Impact**: Eliminates ~138 errors (28% of total) + prevents 403+ restarts  \n**Implementation Time**: 2-4 hours\n\n**Solution**:\n```python\n# Add validation before volatility calculation\ndef safe_implied_volatility(option_price, F, K, t, flag):\n    # Validate parameters\n    if not all([option_price > 0, F > 0, K > 0, t > 0]):\n        logger.warning(\n            f\"Invalid IV calculation parameters: \"\n            f\"price={option_price}, F={F}, K={K}, t={t}\"\n        )\n        return None  # Or use default IV value\n    \n    try:\n        return vectorized_implied_volatility(\n            undiscounted_option_price, F, K, t, flag\n        )\n    except ZeroDivisionError as e:\n        logger.error(f\"IV calculation failed: {e}\")\n        return None\n\n# Update processing loop\nfor option_data in options_stream:\n    iv = safe_implied_volatility(...)\n    if iv is None:\n        continue  # Skip invalid records\n```\n\n**Testing Strategy**:\n1. Test with historical data that triggered errors\n2. Verify logging captures invalid parameters\n3. Confirm no pods restart with invalid data\n4. Monitor error counts for 24 hours post-deployment\n\n---\n\n#### 🟡 HIGH: Improve Cloudflare API Error Handling\n\n**Priority**: HIGH  \n**Impact**: Eliminates 363 errors (72% of total)  \n**Implementation Time**: 4-6 hours\n\n**Solution**:\n```python\ndef verify_deployment_with_backoff(deployment_id, max_retries=3):\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify Cloudflare deployment with exponential backoff and early exit.\n    \"\"\"\n    for attempt in range(max_retries):\n        try:\n            # Check deployment exists first\n            deployment = get_deployment(deployment_id)\n            if not deployment:\n                logger.warning(\n                    f\"Deployment {deployment_id} not found, \"\n                    f\"skipping verification\"\n                )\n                return False\n            \n            # Verify deployment status\n            if deployment['status'] == 'success':\n                return True\n            elif deployment['status'] in ('failed', 'error'):\n                logger.error(f\"Deployment {deployment_id} failed\")\n                return False\n            else:\n                # Still in progress, wait with backoff\n                time.sleep(2 ** attempt)  # Exponential backoff\n                \n        except HTTPError as e:\n            if e.response.status_code == 404:\n                logger.warning(f\"Deployment {deployment_id} not found\")\n                return False  # Exit early on 404\n            elif attempt < max_retries - 1:\n                time.sleep(2 ** attempt)\n            else:\n                raise\n    \n    return False\n\n# Update deployment verification workflow\ndeployment_success = verify_deployment_with_backoff(\n    deployment_id, \n    max_retries=3\n)\n```\n\n**Benefits**:\n- Eliminates retry loops on deleted deployments\n- Reduces API calls from 12 to 3 per failed deployment\n- Improves deployment pipeline reliability\n- Better error logging for debugging\n\n---\n\n#### 🟢 MEDIUM: Clean Up Failed IBKR MCP Pods\n\n**Priority**: MEDIUM  \n**Impact**: Operational hygiene + resource cleanup  \n**Implementation Time**: 15 minutes\n\n**Solution**:\n```bash\n# Remove historical failed pods\nkubectl delete pod ibkr-mcp-server-7d78d47dbb-898mv -n ibkr-mcp\nkubectl delete pod ibkr-mcp-server-7dd7c9c9bc-6cn57 -n ibkr-mcp\n\n# Verify cleanup\nkubectl get pods -n ibkr-mcp\n```\n\n**Benefits**:\n- Cleans up cluster state\n- Reduces monitoring noise\n- Improves operational clarity\n- Frees cluster resources\n\n---\n\n### Medium-Term Improvements\n\n#### 4. Implement Input Validation Framework\n\n**Priority**: MEDIUM  \n**Impact**: Prevents future calculation errors  \n**Implementation Time**: 1-2 days\n\n**Solution Architecture**:\n```python\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel, validator, Field\n\nclass OptionData(BaseModel):\n    \"\"\"Schema for options data with validation.\"\"\"\n    underlying_price: float = Field(gt=0)\n    strike_price: float = Field(gt=0)\n    time_to_expiration: float = Field(gt=0)\n    option_price: float = Field(gt=0)\n    \n    @validator('time_to_expiration')\n    def validate_tte(cls, v):\n        if v <= 0:\n            raise ValueError('Time to expiration must be positive')\n        if v > 365*5:  # 5 years max\n            raise ValueError('Time to expiration too large')\n        return v\n    \n    @validator('option_price')\n    def validate_price(cls, v):\n        if v <= 0:\n            raise ValueError('Option price must be positive')\n        return v\n\n# Use in processing pipeline\nfor raw_data in options_stream:\n    try:\n        validated_data = OptionData(**raw_data)\n        iv = calculate_implied_volatility(validated_data)\n    except ValidationError as e:\n        logger.warning(f\"Invalid options data: {e}\")\n        continue\n```\n\n**Benefits**:\n- Catches invalid data before calculations\n- Provides clear validation error messages\n- Standardizes data quality checks\n- Enables data quality metrics\n\n---\n\n#### 5. Structured Logging**:\n```python\nimport structlog\n\nlogger = structlog.get_logger()\nlogger.error(\n    \"volatility_calculation_failed\",\n    option_price=option_price,\n    strike_price=K,\n    forward_price=F,\n    time_to_expiration=t,\n    error=str(e)\n)\n```\n\n**B. Prometheus Metrics**:\n```python\nfrom prometheus_client import Counter, Histogram\n\nvolatility_errors = Counter(\n    'volatility_calculation_errors_total',\n    'Total volatility calculation errors',\n    ['error_type']\n)\n\ncalculation_duration = Histogram(\n    'volatility_calculation_duration_seconds',\n    'Volatility calculation duration'\n)\n```\n\n**C. Implement Circuit Breaker Pattern\n\n**Priority**: MEDIUM  \n**Impact**: Prevents cascade failures from external dependencies  \n**Implementation Time**: 1-2 days\n\n**Solution**:\n```python\nfrom circuitbreaker import circuit\n\n@circuit(failure_threshold=5, recovery_timeout=60)\ndef verify_cloudflare_deployment(deployment_id):\n    \"\"\"Cloudflare deployment verification with circuit breaker.\"\"\"\n    response = cloudflare_api.get(f\"deployments/{deployment_id}\")\n    if response.status_code == 404:\n        raise DeploymentNotFoundError(f\"Deployment {deployment_id} not found\")\n    return response.json()\n\n# Usage with fallback\ntry:\n    result = verify_cloudflare_deployment(deployment_id)\nexcept CircuitBreakerOpen:\n    logger.error(\"Circuit breaker open - Cloudflare API unavailable\")\n    # Fallback logic or skip deployment verification\nexcept DeploymentNotFoundError:\n    logger.warning(\"Deployment not found\")\n    # Handle expected error\n```\n\n**Benefits**:\n- Prevents cascade failures from external API issues\n- Automatic recovery when service returns\n- Protects against rate limiting\n- Improves system resilience\n\n---\n\n### Long-Term Architecture Improvements\n\n#### 7. Dead Letter Queue Pattern\n\n**Priority**: LOW  \n**Impact**: Better error handling and data recovery  \n**Implementation Time**: 3-5 days\n\n**Architecture**:\n```\nOptions Stream → Validation → Processing → Success\n                    ↓ (failures)\n                 Dead Letter Queue → Manual Review → Reprocess\n```\n\n**Implementation**:\n```python\nimport asyncio\nfrom aiokafka import AIOKafkaProducer\n\nclass OptionsProcessor:\n    def __init__(self):\n        self.dlq_producer = AIOKafkaProducer(\n            bootstrap_servers='kafka:9092'\n        )\n        self.main_topic = 'options-processing'\n        self.dlq_topic = 'options-processing-dlq'\n    \n    async def process_option(self, option_data):\n        try:\n            validated = OptionData(**option_data)\n            iv = calculate_implied_volatility(validated)\n            await self.send_to_main(iv)\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Processing failed: {e}\")\n            await self.send_to_dlq({\n                'data': option_data,\n                'error': str(e),\n                'timestamp': datetime.now().isoformat()\n            })\n```\n\n**Benefits**:\n- Failed records preserved for analysis\n- Manual review and correction workflow\n- Reprocessing capability after fixes\n- Better data quality tracking\n\n---\n\n#### 8. name: logs\n      mountPath: /var/log\n  volumes:\n  - name: logs\n    emptyDir:\n      sizeLimit: \"1Gi\"\n```\n\n**Add Kubernetes Monitoring**:\n```yaml\n# Prometheus alert rules\n- alert: EphemeralStorageHigh\n  expr: kubelet_volume_stats_used_bytes / kubelet_volume_stats_capacity_bytes > 0.8\n  annotations:\n    summary: \"Ephemeral storage usage above 80%\"\n```\n\n**Benefits**:\n- Prevents pod evictions from resource exhaustion\n- Predictable resource allocation\n- Better cluster capacity planning\n- Proactive alerting before resource issues\n\n---\n\n## Conclusion and Next Steps\n\n### Assessment Summary:\n\n#### Options Pipeline: 🔴 **CRITICAL ATTENTION REQUIRED**\n- **Problem**: Application-level instability with 501+ errors over 30 days\n- **Root Causes**: Missing input validation, poor error handling, external API integration issues\n- **Business Impact**: High -       self.failures = 0\n213\t        self.last_failure_time = None\n214\t        self.state = 'CLOSED'\n215\t    \n216\t    def call(self, func, *args, **kwargs):\n217\t        if self.state == 'OPEN':\n218\t            if time.time() - self.last_failure_time > self.timeout:\n219\t                self.state = 'HALF_OPEN'\n220\t            else:\n221\t                raise CircuitBreakerOpenError(\"Circuit breaker is OPEN\")\n222\t        \n223\t        try:\n224\t            result = func(*args, **kwargs)\n225\t            if self.state == 'HALF_OPEN':\n226\t                self.state = 'CLOSED'\n227\t                self.failures = 0\n228\t            return result\n229\t        except ZeroDivisionError:\n230\t            self.failures += 1\n231\t            self.last_failure_time = time.time()\n232\t            if self.failures >= self.failure_threshold:\n233\t                self.state = 'OPEN'\n234\t            raise\n235\t```\n236\t\n237\t---\n238\t\n239\t## Conclusions\n240\t\n241\t### Current System State (Verified 2026-07-24)\n242\t\n243\t**Options Pipeline:** 🔴 CRITICAL — Requires Immediate Code between IBKR MCP failures and options pipeline errors.** The systems fail for completely different reasons with no temporal overlap or dependency relationships.\n431\t\n432\t---\n433\t\n434\t## Recommendations for Improving Resilience\n435\t\n436\t### Immediate Actions (High Priority)\n437\t\n438\t#### 🔴 CRITICAL: Fix ZeroDivisionError in Options-Greeks\n439\t\n440\t**Priority**: CRITICAL  \n441\t**Impact**: Eliminates ~138 errors (28% of total) + prevents 403+ restarts  \n442\t**Implementation Time**: 2-4 hours\n443\t\n444\t**Solution**:\n445\t```python\n446\t# Add validation before volatility calculation\n447\tdef safe_implied_volatility(option_price, F, K, t, flag):\n448\t    # Validate parameters\n449\t    if not all([option_price > 0, F > 0, K > 0, t > 0]):\n450\t        logger.warning(\n451\t            f\"Invalid IV calculation parameters: \"\n452\t            f\"price={option_price}, F={F}, K={K}, t={t}\"\n453\t        )\n454\t        return None  # Or use default IV value\n455\t    \n456\t    try:\n457\t        return vectorized_implied_volatility(\n458\t            undiscounted_option_price, F, K, t, flag\n459\t        )\n460\t    except ZeroDivisionError as e:\n461\t        logger.error(f\"IV calculation failed: {e}\")\n462\t        return None\n463\t\n464\t# Update processing loop\n465\tfor option_data in options_stream:\n466\t    iv = safe_implied_volatility(...)\n467\t    if iv is None:\n468\t        continue  # Skip invalid records\n469\t```\n470\t\n471\t**Testing Strategy**:\n472\t1. Test with historical data that triggered errors\n473\t2. Verify logging captures invalid parameters\n474\t3. Confirm no pods restart with invalid data\n475\t4. Monitor error counts for 24 hours post-deployment\n476\t\n477\t---\n478\t\n479\t#### 🟡 HIGH: Improve Cloudflare API Error Handling\n480\t\n481\t**Priority**: HIGH  \n482\t**Impact**: Eliminates 363 errors (72% of total)  \n483\t**Implementation Time**: 4-6 hours\n484\t\n485\t**Solution**:\n486\t```python\n487\tdef verify_deployment_with_backoff(deployment_id, max_retries=3):\n488\t    \"\"\"\n489\t    Verify Cloudflare deployment with exponential backoff and early exit.\n490\t    \"\"\"\n491\t    for attempt in range(max_retries):\n492\t        try:\n493\t            # Check deployment exists first\n494\t            deployment = get_deployment(deployment_id)\n495\t            if not deployment:\n496\t                logger.warning(\n497\t                    f\"Deployment {deployment_id} not found, \"\n498\t                    f\"skipping verification\"\n499\t                )\n500\t                return False\n501\t            \n502\t            # Verify deployment status\n503\t            if deployment['status'] == 'success':\n504\t                return True\n505\t            elif deployment['status'] in ('failed', 'error'):\n506\t                logger.error(f\"Deployment {deployment_id} failed\")\n507\t                return False\n508\t            else:\n509\t                # Still in progress, wait with backoff\n510\t                time.sleep(2 ** attempt)  # Exponential backoff\n511\t                \n512\t        except HTTPError as e:\n513\t            if e.response.status_code == 404:\n514\t                logger.warning(f\"Deployment {deployment_id} not found\")\n515\t                return False  # Exit early on 404\n516\t            elif attempt < max_retries - 1:\n517\t                time.sleep(2 ** attempt)\n518\t            else:\n519\t                raise\n520\t    \n521\t    return False\n522\t\n523\t# Update deployment verification workflow\n524\tdeployment_success = verify_deployment_with_backoff(\n525\t    deployment_id, \n526\t    max_retries=3\n527\t)\n528\t```\n529\t\n530\t**Benefits**:\n531\t- Eliminates retry loops on deleted deployments\n532\t- Reduces API calls from 12 to 3 per failed deployment\n533\t- Improves deployment pipeline reliability\n534\t- Better error logging for debugging\n535\t\n536\t---\n537\t\n538\t#### 🟢 MEDIUM: Clean Up Failed IBKR MCP Pods\n539\t\n540\t**Priority**: MEDIUM  \n541\t**Impact**: Operational hygiene + resource cleanup  \n542\t**Implementation Time**: 15 minutes\n543\t\n544\t**Solution**:\n545\t```bash\n546\t# Remove historical failed pods\n547\tkubectl delete pod ibkr-mcp-server-7d78d47dbb-898mv -n ibkr-mcp\n548\tkubectl delete pod ibkr-mcp-server-7dd7c9c9bc-6cn57 -n ibkr-mcp\n549\t\n550\t# Verify cleanup\n551\tkubectl get pods -n ibkr-mcp\n552\t```\n553\t\n554\t**Benefits**:\n555\t- Cleans up cluster state\n556\t- Reduces monitoring noise\n557\t- Improves operational clarity\n558\t- Frees cluster resources\n559\t\n560\t---\n561\t\n562\t### Medium-Term Improvements\n563\t\n564\t#### 4. Implement Input Validation Framework\n565\t\n566\t**Priority**: MEDIUM  \n567\t**Impact**: Prevents future calculation errors  \n568\t**Implementation Time**: 1-2 days\n569\t\n570\t**Solution Architecture**:\n571\t```python\n572\tfrom pydantic import BaseModel, validator, Field\n573\t\n574\tclass OptionData(BaseModel):\n575\t    \"\"\"Schema for options data with validation.\"\"\"\n576\t    underlying_price: float = Field(gt=0)\n577\t    strike_price: float = Field(gt=0)\n578\t    time_to_expiration: float = Field(gt=0)\n579\t    option_price: float = Field(gt=0)\n580\t    \n581\t    @validator('time_to_expiration')\n582\t    def validate_tte(cls, v):\n583\t        if v <= 0:\n584\t            raise ValueError('Time to expiration must be positive')\n585\t        if v > 365*5:  # 5 years max\n586\t            raise ValueError('Time to expiration too large')\n587\t        return v\n588\t    \n589\t    @validator('option_price')\n590\t    def validate_price(cls, v):\n591\t        if v <= 0:\n592\t            raise ValueError('Option price must be positive')\n593\t        return v\n594\t\n595\t# Use in processing pipeline\n596\tfor raw_data in options_stream:\n597\t    try:\n598\t        validated_data = OptionData(**raw_data)\n599\t        iv = calculate_implied_volatility(validated_data)\n600\t    except ValidationError as e:\n601\t        logger.warning(f\"Invalid options data: {e}\")\n602\t        continue\n603\t```\n604\t\n605\t**Benefits**:\n606\t- Catches invalid data before calculations\n607\t- Provides clear validation error messages\n608\t- Standardizes data quality checks\n609\t- Enables data quality metrics\n610\t\n611\t---\n612\t\n613\t#### 5. Enhance Observability and Monitoring\n614\t\n615\t**Priority**: MEDIUM  \n616\t**Impact**: Better error tracking and alerting  \n617\t**Implementation Time**: 2-3 days\n618\t\n619\t**Solution Components**:\n620\t\n621\t**A. Dashboards and Alerts**:\n653\t```yaml\n654\t# Prometheus alert rules\n655\tgroups:\n656\t- name: options_pipeline\n657\t  rules:\n658\t  - alert: HighVolatilityCalculationErrors\n659\t    expr: rate(volatility_calculation_errors_total[5m]) > 0.1\n660\t    annotations:\n661\t      summary: \"High volatility calculation error rate\"\n662\t      \n663\t  - alert: HighPodRestartRate  \n664\t    expr: rate(kube_pod_status_phase{phase=\"Failed\"}[5m]) > 0.05\n665\t    annotations:\n666\t      summary: \"High pod restart rate detected\"\n667\t```\n668\t\n669\t**Benefits**:\n670\t- Real-time error tracking\n671\t- Proactive alerting before failures\n672\t- Better debugging capabilities\n673\t- Trend analysis and capacity planning\n674\t\n675\t---\n676\t\n677\t#### 6. Implement Circuit Breaker Pattern\n678\t\n679\t**Priority**: MEDIUM  \n680\t**Impact**: Prevents cascade failures from external dependencies  \n681\t**Implementation Time**: 1-2 days\n682\t\n683\t**Solution**:\n684\t```python\n685\tfrom circuitbreaker import circuit\n686\t\n687\t@circuit(failure_threshold=5, recovery_timeout=60)\n688\tdef verify_cloudflare_deployment(deployment_id):\n689\t    \"\"\"Cloudflare deployment verification with circuit breaker.\"\"\"\n690\t    response = cloudflare_api.get(f\"deployments/{deployment_id}\")\n691\t    if response.status_code == 404:\n692\t        raise DeploymentNotFoundError(f\"Deployment {deployment_id} not found\")\n693\t    return response.json()\n694\t\n695\t# Usage with fallback\n696\ttry:\n697\t    result = verify_cloudflare_deployment(deployment_id)\n698\texcept CircuitBreakerOpen:\n699\t    logger.error(\"Circuit breaker open - Cloudflare API unavailable\")\n700\t    # Fallback logic or skip deployment verification\n701\texcept DeploymentNotFoundError:\n702\t    logger.warning(\"Deployment not found\")\n703\t    # Handle expected error\n704\t```\n705\t\n706\t**Benefits**:\n707\t- Prevents cascade failures from external API issues\n708\t- Automatic recovery when service returns\n709\t- Protects against rate limiting\n710\t- Improves system resilience\n711\t\n712\t---\n713\t\n714\t### Long-Term Architecture Improvements\n715\t\n716\t#### 7. {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"call_9e86b5f856f348eda0822aa6","type":"tool_result","content":"1\t# aide-de-camp\n2\t\n3\t**A personal command interface.** Speak or type a stream-of-consciousness request — spanning multiple projects, questions, and tasks — and receive parallel, organized results on a live browser canvas or in audio.\n4\t\n5\tCLI alias: `adc`\n6\t\n7\t---\n8\t\n9\t## How It Works\n10\t\n11\t1. **Intent routing** — a single fast LLM call segments your utterance into typed intent threads, each tagged with a project, an intent type (`status`, `action`, `brainstorm`, `lookup`, `reminder`, `self-modification`, `monitoring-config`, `task-profile`, `clarification`), and an urgency level (`critical`, `high`, `normal`, `low`).\n12\t\n13\t2. **Parallel dispatch** — all threads run concurrently. A compound utterance touching five projects takes as long as the slowest single agent, not their sum.\n14\t\n15\t3. **Fetch strand** — each agent runs deterministic commands against live data sources (kubectl, git, local repos, SSH targets) to gather raw context for its thread.\n16\t\n17\t4. **Synthesize strand** — one LLM call per thread converts the raw data into a 2–3 sentence structured result.\n18\t\n19\t5. **Canvas delivery** — results stream to the browser via SSE and render as HTML cards, one per topic, updated in place as agents resolve.\n20\t\n21\t```\n22\t  Voice / Text Input\n23\t  \"has the pipeline caught up? also what's the ibkr mcp status?\"\n24\t                        │\n25\t                        ▼\n26\t             ┌──────────────────┐\n27\t             │   Intent Router  │  ← one LLM call, splits utterance\n28\t             └──────────────────┘\n29\t                        │\n30\t          ┌─────────────┴──────────────┐\n31\t          ▼                            ▼\n32\t   [agent: pipeline]           [agent: ibkr-mcp]\n33\t   Fetch → Synthesize           Fetch → Synthesize\n34\t          │                            │\n35\t          └──────────────┬─────────────┘\n36\t                         ▼\n37\t              ┌─────────────────────────┐\n38\t              │  Canvas (SSE)           │\n39\t              │  ┌─────────┐ ┌───────┐  │\n40\t              │  │pipeline │ │ibkr   │  │\n41\t              │  │ card    │ │ card  │  │\n42\t              │  └─────────┘ └───────┘  │\n43\t              └─────────────────────────┘\n44\t```\n45\t\n46\t**Task-profile intents** skip fetch/synthesize. Instead, a work item is created and picked up asynchronously by an async worker fleet. When the work completes, the result is pushed to the canvas via the bead watcher daemon.\n47\t\n48\t---\n49\t\n50\t## Features\n51\t\n52\t### Input methods\n53\t- **Text**: browser canvas at `http://localhost:8000/` or CLI: `adc dispatch \"...\"`\n54\t- **Voice**: OpenAI Realtime API (WebRTC) — speak directly into the browser\n55\t\n56\t### Live canvas\n57\tSingle-page dark-themed UI (`src/canvas/index.html`). Results stream in via Server-Sent Events. Each distinct topic (project + intent) gets its own card, updated in place as results arrive. No page reload needed.\n58\t\n59\t### Voice narration\n60\tResults are narrated at urgency-tiered conversational pauses:\n61\t- `critical` — interrupt immediately\n62\t- `high` — next natural pause\n63\t- `normal` — batched delivery\n64\t- `low` — only when idle\n65\t\n66\t### Self-modification and hot-reload\n67\tAll behavior-defining artifacts are plain files, re-read on every invocation:\n68\t- `prompts/router.md`, `prompts/synthesize.md`, `prompts/voice.md`, `prompts/urgency.md`\n69\t- `config/registry.yaml` — project and alias definitions\n70\t- `config/monitoring.yaml` — ambient monitoring rules\n71\t- `data/components.db` — versioned HTML/CSS card templates (SQLite)\n72\t\n73\tA spoken instruction like \"the deploy card is too cluttered\" triggers the `SelfModificationAgent`, which generates a diff, surfaces it for approval, and hot-reloads the artifact. No redeploy needed.\n74\t\n75\t### Project registry\n76\t`config/registry.yaml` defines explicit project entries with cluster targets, namespaces, aliases, and workflow templates. aide-de-camp also auto-discovers git repos at startup. Refresh via `POST /api/v1/environment/refresh`.\n77\t\n78\t### Session persistence\n79\tSession state lives in a SQLite WAL database (`data/session.db`). Tables: `sessions`, `surfaces`, `utterances`, `intents`, `topics`, `results`. The same session is accessible from the canvas, CLI, or audio mode simultaneously.\n80\t\n81\t---\n82\t\n83\t## Quick Start\n84\t\n85\t```bash\n86\t# Clone and install\n87\tgit clone <repo-url> aide-de-camp\n88\tcd aide-de-camp\n89\t\n90\tpip install -e \".[dev]\"\n91\t# or\n92\tpip install -r requirements.txt\n93\t\n94\t# Start the server\n95\tuvicorn src.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000\n96\t\n97\t# Verify it's running\n98\tcurl -s http://localhost:8000/health\n99\t```\n100\t\n101\tOpen `http://localhost:8000/` in your browser to use the canvas.\n102\t\n103\tFor voice mode, an OpenAI API key with Realtime API access is required (set `OPENAI_API_KEY`).\n104\t\n105\t---\n106\t\n107\t## CLI Usage\n108\t\n109\t```bash\n110\t# Route an utterance and stream results to the canvas\n111\tadc dispatch \"has the options pipeline caught up?\"\n112\t\n113\t# Query a specific topic\n114\tadc ask \"what name candidates did we have for pdftract?\"\n115\t\n116\t# Current session summary\n117\tadc status\n118\t\n119\t# List active topic cards\n120\tadc topics\n121\t\n122\t# Show exception queue\n123\tadc exceptions\n124\t\n125\t# Configure the CLI\n126\tadc config --set-server http://myhost:8000\n127\tadc config --set-session <session-id>\n128\t\n129\t# Help\n130\tadc --help\n131\t```\n132\t\n133\t---\n134\t\n135\t## Configuration\n136\t\n137\t### Environment variables\n138\t\n139\t| Variable | Purpose | Default |\n140\t|----------|---------|---------|\n141\t| `OPENAI_API_KEY` | OpenAI key — required for voice/Realtime API | _(none; voice disabled without it)_ |\n142\t| `ZAI_PROXY_URL` | ZAI proxy endpoint for LLM calls (routing and synthesis) | `https://zai-proxy-mcp-apexalgo-iad-ts.ardenone.com:8444/v1/messages` |\n143\t| `ADC_SERVER_URL` | Server URL used by the `adc` CLI | `http://localhost:8000` |\n144\t| `ADC_TELEGRAM_BRIDGE_URL` | Telegram bridge URL for async task notifications (see note below) | `https://telegram-proxy-telegram-bridge-ardenone-cluster-ts.ardenone.com:8444` |\n145\t| `ADC_WHISPER_STT_URL` | Whisper STT service URL for browser speech-to-text fallback | `https://whisper.ardenone.com` |\n146\t\n147\tThe LLM backend for intent routing and synthesis is configured via the `ZAI_PROXY_URL` environment variable. All LLM calls route through the ZAI proxy.\n148\t\n149\t**Telegram bridge (`ADC_TELEGRAM_BRIDGE_URL`) — reachability.** The value above is the Traefik `vpn`-entrypoint route for the `telegram-proxy` service on `ardenone-cluster` (IngressRoute `telegram-proxy-vpn`, namespace `telegram-bridge` → svc `telegram-proxy:8080`). The route and request contract are verified against the live service:\n150\t\n151\t- `GET /health` → `200 {\"ok\":true,\"polling\":true,\"contract_version\":\"1.0\"}`\n152\t- `POST /send` accepts `{chat_id, text, parse_mode}` (returns `405` on GET — endpoint exists, POST-only)\n153\t- `GET /send_message` → `404` (the originally-assumed path does **not** exist)\n154\t\n155\tThe fallback client in `src/telegram/fallback.py` sends to `/send` and probes `/health`, matching this contract. The in-code default (`http://telegram-claude-bridge:8000`) is the in-cluster service name for a future in-cluster deployment; set `ADC_TELEGRAM_BRIDGE_URL` to the `*-ts.ardenone.com` URL above for the local Phase-0 host.\n156\t\n157\t> **DNS caveat (verified 2026-07-19):** on this host the `*.ts.ardenone.com` split-DNS names — this bridge hostname included — do **not** resolve (`getaddrinfo` fails), while other mesh names such as the ZAI proxy do. The route itself is confirmed reachable when the name resolves (e.g. via the cluster's Tailscale egress). Until the DNS record is created, point `ADC_TELEGRAM_BRIDGE_URL` at a resolvable address or add a local/mesh-DNS mapping; otherwise the startup reachability probe fails and `/api/v1/status/telegram_bridge` reports `reachable: false`.\n158\t\n159\t### Prompts directory\n160\t\n161\tAll prompts are hot-reloaded on every invocation. Edit these files to tune behavior without restarting the server:\n162\t\n163\t| File | Purpose |\n164\t|------|---------|\n165\t| `prompts/router.md` | Intent classification and thread segmentation |\n166\t| `prompts/synthesize.md` | Result synthesis (raw data → 2–3 sentence summary) |\n167\t| `prompts/voice.md` | Narration style and pacing |\n168\t| `prompts/urgency.md` | Urgency classification rules |\n169\t\n170\t### Project registry\n171\t\n172\t`config/registry.yaml` defines the projects aide-de-camp knows about. Each entry specifies:\n173\t- `name` and `aliases` — how the router maps utterance fragments to projects\n174\t- `cluster` and `namespace` — where to run kubectl-based fetch commands\n175\t- `workflow_templates` — named multi-step workflows (e.g., \"deploy\", \"rollback\")\n176\t\n177\t---\n178\t\n179\t## Architecture\n180\t\n181\t### Key source files\n182\t\n183\t| File | Responsibility |\n184\t|------|---------------|\n185\t| `src/main.py` | FastAPI app; `/dispatch`, `/voice`, `/sse` endpoints |\n186\t| `src/intent/router.py` | LLM classification and parallel thread dispatch |\n187\t| `src/fetch/commands.py` | Fetch command matrix, intent types, data structures |\n188\t| `src/fetch/orchestrator.py` | Concurrent fetch execution with streaming and coverage tracking (FetchStrand implementation) |\n189\t| `src/synthesize/strand.py` | LLM synthesis strand |\n190\t| `src/session/store.py` | SQLite session store (aiosqlite) |\n191\t| `src/sse/broadcaster.py` | SSE connection registry and event routing |\n192\t| `src/canvas/index.html` | Canvas single-page app |\n193\t| `src/realtime/session.py` | OpenAI Realtime API voice session |\n194\t| `src/watcher/daemon.py` | Async work-item watcher — pushes completed results to canvas |\n195\t| `src/agents/self_modification.py` | Self-improvement agent |\n196\t| `src/environment/discovery.py` | Local and remote repo scanner |\n197\t| `config/registry.yaml` | Explicit project registry |\n198\t| `prompts/` | Hot-reload prompt files |\n199\t\n200\t### Runtime breakdown\n201\t\n202\t| Runtime | Used for |\n203\t|---------|---------|\n204\t| Realtime API | Voice model (persistent session, voice I/O) |\n205\t| Configurable LLM backend | Intent router, synthesize strand |\n206\t| Deterministic code | Fetch strand (kubectl/git execution), bead watcher |\n207\t| Async worker fleet | UI-regen agent, self-modification agent, background analysis, task work items |\n208\t\n209\t### Data flow\n210\t\n211\t```\n212\tPOST /dispatch\n213\t  → intent router (LLM classify)\n214\t  → N parallel: fetch strand → synthesize strand\n215\t  → persist: topic + result in session.db\n216\t  → broadcast SSEEvent(\"result_created\", surface_id)\n217\t  → canvas calls GET /api/v1/sessions/{id}/topics\n218\t  → cards rendered / updated in place\n219\t```\n220\t\n221\t---\n222\t\n223\t## Requirements\n224\t\n225\t- Python 3.11+\n226\t- `fastapi`, `uvicorn[standard]`, `httpx`, `websockets`, `pydantic`, `aiosqlite`\n227\t- Dev: `pytest`, `pytest-asyncio`, `ruff`\n228\t\n229\t---\n230\t\n231\t## Versioning\n232\t\n233\tVersion is in `pyproject.toml` only. No CI build — runs from source.\n234\t\n235\tRelease: bump version in `pyproject.toml` → commit → `git tag vX.Y.Z` → push.\n236\t"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"call_c62feb60a22f450fb73dafe8","session_id":"883df391-1510-484c-879a-f3aff9f5f668","uuid":"01edd0ec-a461-4f01-acb3-e29a46b8e3d6","timestamp":"2026-07-24T14:00:36.707Z","subagent_type":"Explore","task_description":"Locate options pipeline and IBKR MCP logs"}
